title: onosma helvetica subsp. tridentina
intro: Onosma helvetica subsp. tridentina, also known as the Alpine Onosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, which is native to the Alps in Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammation, due to the presence of glycosides and iridoid compounds. The health benefits of Alpine Onosma include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive discomfort, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Alpine Onosma can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
